name: Smart Model Router
description: Intelligently route AI requests to the optimal model based on task type, cost, speed, and quality preferences

taskRules.description: Custom task type to model mapping

defaultStrategy.label: Default Routing Strategy
defaultStrategy.description: cost = cheapest model, speed = fastest, quality = best output, balanced = smart mix

enableLogging.label: Enable Routing Logs
enableLogging.description: Record all routing decisions for analytics and optimization

enableFallback.label: Enable Auto Fallback
enableFallback.description: Automatically switch to backup model if primary model fails
